name: Riff
tagline: Speak freely. Nothing leaves your iPhone.
metaDescription: Speak freely. Nothing leaves your iPhone. Riff is a private, on-device voice-to-text app with AI Recaps and action items.

features.title: On-Device Voice-to-Text
features.description: Record your voice and Riff transcribes it to text right on your iPhone, using Apple's on-device speech recognition. Your audio never leaves your device.

features.title: Recaps & Action Items
features.description: With riff+, turn rambling dictation into clean Recaps, action items, and smart titles — generated on your device by Apple's foundation models.

features.title: 100% Private
features.description: Your voice and your words never leave your iPhone. No accounts, no servers, no analytics, no tracking SDKs.

features.title: One-Time Purchase
features.description: riff+ unlocks the AI features for a single $19.99 purchase. It's not a subscription — there's nothing to renew or cancel.

newsletterPrompt: Get the launch note when Riff ships — and nothing else.
